name: event with 5 topics
description: Positive test: event with 5 topic symbols exceeds the recommended max of 4

name: event with Bytes in topics
description: Positive test: event with Bytes type in topics should flag as large payload

name: event with 4 topics (max allowed)
description: Negative test: event with exactly 4 topics should NOT flag

name: no event publish calls
description: Negative test: code with no event publish calls should not flag

name: mix of violating and safe events
description: Edge case: multiple events, some exceeding limits and some safe
